content.body: thanks for all your PRs, dietrich and Andrew Whalley (Google)  (as well as the existing PR from Giovanni Corti (FBK)  and the contents under development by Sam ). It's great to have this broad group of contributors all working together here!

content.body: I regret being a bit beind myself but I'm optimistic that we'll keep making progress here in filling this whole thing out and reviewing each other's work.
I'm looking forward to discussing Annex B on Monday, and reviewing and merging all the outstanding PRs on Wednesday
